rules.name: Run_Recalc_GrandTotal
rules.description: After saving or deleting a commission amount line, recalculate the header GrandTotal as sum of all CommissionAmt values

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when commission run status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: Amt_Lines_ReadOnly
rules.description: All commission amount lines are read-only since they are generated by the commission calculation process
